title: ModUtils
description: Adds multiple QOL features for Mod/Admins on the DiamondFire Minecraft Server.
body:
This is a mod that aims to add many QOL features for Mods/Admins on the DiamondFire Minecraft server.

# **Features**
- Custom reports screen (opened with /reports)
- Report popups to avoid chat clutter
- Custom /mod log and /admin log screens
- Vanish overlay
- ~~Custom /history menu~~ Will reimplement once Mod rework is out

# **Planned Features**
- Keybind to repeat last teleport command

If you have suggestions, you can bring them up in #staffchat or dm sapfii.df on discord!

This mod works with ModMenu, but it's config can be accessed by doing /modutils.
